zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Paynel於1058年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye33歲，母親Lesceline de Fontenay34歲。他於1084年之前與Maud Surdeval結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1087年被列為sheriff of yorkshire。他去世於1124年之前在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Paynel于1058年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye33岁，母亲Lesceline de Fontenay34岁。他于1084年之前与Maud Surdeval结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1087年被列为sheriff of yorkshire。他去世于1124年之前在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Paynel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Payne , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Paynel was born in 1058, in Normandy, France, his father, Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye, was 33 and his mother, Lesceline de Fontenay, was 34. He married Maud Surdeval before 1084. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. In 1087, his occupation is listed as sheriff of yorkshire. He died before 1124, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Paynel est né en 1058, à Normandie, France, son père, Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lesceline de Fontenay, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Maud Surdeval avant 1084. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. En 1087, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of yorkshire. Il est décédé avant 1124, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Paynel 1058 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye 33 und seine Mutter Lesceline de Fontenay 34. Er hat vor 1084 Maud Surdeval geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1087 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of yorkshire aufgeführt. Er starb vor 1124 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Paynel è nato il nel 1058 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Lesceline de Fontenay, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Maud Surdeval prima del 1084. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1087, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of yorkshire. Morì prima del 1124, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Paynelが1058年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambyeは33歳，母Lesceline de Fontenayは34歳であった。1084年以前にMaud Surdevalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1087年，職業はsheriff of yorkshireと記録されている。彼は1124年以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Paynel(이)가 1058년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Lesceline de Fontenay(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1084년 이전 Maud Surdeval(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1087년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of yorkshire이었다. 그는 1124년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Paynel nasceu em 1058, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lesceline de Fontenay, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Surdeval antes 1084. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1087, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of yorkshire. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Paynel родился в 1058 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lesceline de Fontenay, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Surdeval перед 1084 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1087 году он работал по профессии sheriff of yorkshire. Он умер перед 1124 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Paynel nació en 1058, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guilluame Paganel seigneur des Moutiers et de Hambye, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lesceline de Fontenay, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Maud Surdeval antes de 1084. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. En 1087, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of yorkshire. Murió antes de 1124, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
